docket_entries.description: APPL & DECLARATION FOR ORDER PROHIBITING DOMESTIC VIOLENCE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE-DOMESTIC VIOLENCE, CALENDAR MOTION: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, CALENDAR MOTION: TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER HEARING SET FOR AUG-04-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 404
STIPULATION THAT COMMISSIONER KING MAY ACT AS JUDGE PRO TEM BY CATHERINE ORAZCO FOR PET
(404)PETITIONER APPEARED WITH COUNSEL. RESPONDENT DID NOT APPEAR. THE COURT FOUND THAT NOTICE HAD BEEN GIVEN AS REQUIRED BY LAW. THE COURT GRANTED A RESTRAINING ORDER
THAT SHALL REMAIN IN EFFECT FOR THREE YEARS. RESPONDENT SHALL NOT RETURN TO THE RESIDENCE. RESPONDENT SHALL NOT CONTACT, MOLEST, ATTACK, STRIKE,
PONDENT SHALL STAY 150 YARDS FROM PETITIONER, PETITIONER'S CHILDREN, PETITIONER'S RESIDENCE, AND PETITIONER'S WORKPLACE. LEGAL AND PHYSICAL CUSTODY
PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY HELEN SOREP-MATLEY CSR# 9225
WAS AWARDED TO PETITIONER. THERE SHALL BE NO VISITATION PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT. (KING)ITIONER'S WORKPLACE. LEGAL AND PHYSICAL CUSTODY
